descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
Each Tentacle's attack increases Temporary {Tentacle DMG} by [Arg3]% of Tulu's ATK, up to [Arg4] {plural:[Arg4]|time|times} per turn.
When there are 1/2/3 other {Lemurian} Awakeners in the team, all enemies receive 10%/25%/50% more {Tentacle DMG}.
